name: Bulgur and Walnut Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Minced fresh herbs (rosemary & thyme are nice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion and garlic in oil until soft.
2. Add mushrooms and continue cooking until most of the mushroom liquid has evaporated. Remove from heat.
3. Blend in herbs, tamari, Vegemite (if using), salt, and pepper to taste. Set aside.
4. Toast bulgur over medium heat in a dry saucepan until lightly browned, stirring constantly.
5. Add mushroom mixture and water to the bulgur and simmer until liquid is absorbed. Remove from heat.
6. Stir in mashed carrots, flour, and breadcrumbs. Adjust seasoning if necessary.
7. Turn the mixture out into a greased loaf pan, cover with aluminum foil, and bake at a moderate temperature for about one hour.
